training_status: active (resistance training during weight loss phase)

benefits.description: Lost 35 lbs total over 3 months (2 months on reta); currently losing weight at 1mg dose
Very noticeable hunger suppression at 1mg; maintains 2300-2400 cal/day average
Gained good amount of muscle during weight loss phase; no muscle loss

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg, increased to 0.75mg after 2 weeks, then to 1mg after 4 weeks, stayed at 1mg for 3 months. Also running test and tren (per commenter reference). Diet described as 'spot on'. Planning to increase dose again soon due to slightly reduced appetite suppression.
